'''''The Last Command'' 4''' is the fourth issue in the [[Star Wars: The Last Command (comic series)|''Star Wars: The Last Command'' comic adaptation]] series of comics based on the novel ''[[The Last Command]]''. It was released [[March 25]], [[1998]].

==Publisher's summary==
''Continuing the [[Star Wars: The Last Command (comic series)|adaptation of the sequel]] to [[Dark Force Rising|''Star Wars: Dark Force Rising'']]. Adapted from the best-selling [[Bantam Spectra|Bantam]] [[The Last Command|novel]] by [[Timothy Zahn]], with fantastic art by a pair of Russ Manning Award-winners, [[Edvin Biuković|Edvin Biukovic]], and [[Eric Shanower]]''.
